mechanism_narrative: Rising real savings and asset flows (RSAFS) directly increase liquidity available for equity purchases, generating positive forward returns for the S&P 500 over a one-month horizon.
failure_condition: Rank IC for RSAFS momentum remains below 0.02 over rolling 3-year windows, or positive returns do not exceed 55% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in total nonfarm payrolls (PAYEMS) exceeding 200,000 signals robust economic expansion that boosts corporate earnings expectations, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Forward 20-day returns are negative in more than 60% of months where PAYEMS rises above 200k, or t-statistic for return difference is below 1.5.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in real GDP (GDPC1) and housing starts (HOUST) confirms broad-based demand recovery, which amplifies equity valuations and produces positive forward returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: Interaction term between GDPC1 and HOUST growth rates yields negative or insignificant coefficients in quarterly return regressions over 5-year samples.

mechanism_narrative: Declining industrial production (INDPRO) during a monetary tightening cycle indicates supply-side contraction that outweighs demand, forcing equity prices lower over the following week.
failure_condition: INDPRO declines during tightening periods are followed by positive 5-day returns in over 50% of cases, or regime-conditional alpha is statistically indistinguishable from zero.

mechanism_narrative: A federal funds rate (FEDFUNDS) crossing above 5.0% triggers a sharp repricing of long-duration equity cash flows, generating negative forward returns for the S&P 500 over the next month.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns remain positive in more than 55% of observations where FEDFUNDS exceeds 5.0%, or out-of-sample hit rate falls below 50%.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between rising unemployment (UNRATE) and falling payroll employment (PAYEMS) signals labor market deterioration that suppresses consumer spending and corporate profits, driving negative equity returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: Joint model of UNRATE and PAYEMS yields negative predictive power (Rank IC < -0.01) or fails to beat a baseline momentum strategy in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained increases in consumer price index (CPIAUCSL) reflect strong aggregate demand that supports corporate revenue growth, producing positive forward returns for equities over a one-week horizon.
failure_condition: CPIAUCSL momentum shows no statistical relationship with 5-day forward returns (p-value > 0.10) across multiple rolling 3-year estimation windows.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production (INDPRO) falling below its 12-month moving average indicates a supply-side recession that reduces capacity utilization and earnings, triggering negative S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Forward 20-day returns are positive in over 60% of months where INDPRO trades below its 12-month average, or signal hit rate drops below 45%.
